daily.today_energy: Mercury's got you feeling sharp and curious today, Virgo. There's this quiet momentum building—perfect for organizing your thoughts and trusting your gut instincts. You're basically in your main character era.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your partner might pick up on your grounded energy and vibe with it hard. Single? Someone's noticing your quiet confidence. Either way, authenticity is your love language rn.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is literally glowing today. This is the moment to speak up about that idea you've been sitting on or tackle something you've been procrastinating about. Your work ethic hits different.
daily.health: Your body's asking for balance—maybe less scrolling, more moving. A walk or gentle stretch could shift your whole energy. Listen to what feels nourishing instead of forcing a routine that doesn't fit.

weekly.overview: Mercury's got your back this week, Virgo. You're in a reflective mood, and honestly? That's your superpower right now. Trust the quiet moments—they're organizing your next move before you even realize it.
weekly.love: Someone's been noticing your energy shifts. Whether you're coupled up or exploring, this week invites authentic conversations. Stop overanalyzing every text and just feel it out. Vulnerability looks good on you.
weekly.career: Your attention to detail is about to become someone's game-changer. A project or conversation you thought was settled might circle back—and that's actually the universe giving you a second chance to set new boundaries.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for rest, not another optimization hack. Try grounding practices that don't require a plan: walks, tea, sitting with your thoughts. Your body's wisdom is louder than usual.
